scripts.build: mkdir -p transformers && cp node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded* transformers/ && npx esbuild offscreen.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=offscreen.bundle.js
scripts.package: npm run build && zip -r defluff.zip manifest.json background.js content.js styles.css hide-interact.css offscreen.html offscreen.bundle.js transformers/ icons/
